claim_text: The Earth orbits the Sun.
Light travels faster than sound.
The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
Humans normally have 46 chromosomes.
There are eight planets in the Solar System.
DNA stands for deoxyribonucleic acid.
Antibiotics reliably cure viral infections like the flu.
Australia is in the Northern Hemisphere.
Electrons are larger than atoms.
The Great Wall of China is clearly visible from space with the naked eye.
Venus has more moons than Mars.
Water freezes at 50 degrees Celsius at sea level.
Carbon dioxide is a greenhouse gas.
Sharks are mammals.
The human heart normally has four chambers.
Mount Everest is the tallest mountain above sea level on Earth.
Gold is less dense than water.
Sound needs a medium to travel.
The Atlantic Ocean is larger than the Pacific Ocean.
Plants convert carbon dioxide into oxygen during photosynthesis.
A leap year usually has 366 days.
Mercury is farther from the Sun than Earth.
Bananas naturally grow on trees.
The speed of light is faster than the speed of sound.
